comment: Single source of truth for STOW profile identity, activation, and runtime check gating. Consumed by runtime/profiles.py (shipped), the generators, and the tests. Checks absent from a profile's lint_checks map are always-on and never profile-gated.

auto_contexts: any editable user-facing prose turn with no more specific profile match
profiles.notes: Actionability, progressive disclosure, prose integrity, factual accuracy, and protected-region handling. Imposes no controlled punctuation, contraction, vocabulary, or sentence-length rules.

Mechanical checks are identical to stow-default by design. Adds review-level terminology and wording-consistency guidance, stable names, bounded steps, explicit conditions, and evidence-aware claims. Meta-code artifacts bind to this profile. Makes no controlled-language conformance claim.

auto_contexts: formal controlled-technical output explicitly requested by the user
profiles.notes: Applies the available structural guidance of the controlled-technical rule families. Dictionary-dependent checks are unavailable and are reported as such. This profile never claims strict conformance.
Locked and unavailable. Full conformance cannot be claimed without the controlled dictionary, which is not part of this release.

raw.notes: Raw JSON, JSONL, YAML, code, quotations, identifiers, commands, paths, and schema-controlled values load no user-facing prose checks. No conversational wrapper is added when raw output is requested.
